title: Keep Britain Working Review: Discovery
body: "The discovery phase of the Keep Britain Working independent review aims to understand the characteristics and drivers of rising levels of inactivity and ill health. This includes exploring where there is the greatest potential for employers and government to make a difference. This publication also sets out key areas of interest which will frame the engagement phase of the review.  The terms of reference set out the purpose and scope of this review.  Feedback We would welcome your views on the areas set out in the discovery report of the review. Please provide feedback on workplace interventions that have been successful in supporting employees with health conditions and disabled employees in work through the Keep Britain Working Engagement form  Contact For further information, email keepbritainworking.review@dwp.gov.uk "
